title: Command Hangar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Command Hangar''' was the main launch bay on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']]. Near the bottom of the ship, it was guarded by two [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
